cases.title: Add multiple conditions to program
cases.notes: Verified: two Order status conditions (Completed + Pending) added, saved, close+reopen persistence confirmed. Operator 'If any of the following criteria' applied to both. Cleanup: both conditions removed and saved.

cases.title: Remove condition from program
cases.notes: Setup: added Completed + Pending conditions. Removed Completed condition via delete icon, saved. Close+reopen confirmed only 'Order status is Pending' present; Completed condition absent. Single-condition program saved cleanly.

cases.title: Condition with different order statuses
cases.notes: Opened status picker on existing Pending condition row. Dropdown exposed 6 selectable options (Pending excluded as already-selected tag). All 7 statuses confirmed present: ReadyForPickup, Custom, Cancelled, New, Completed, Pending, Payment required.

cases.title: Set fixed points reward
cases.notes: Clicked 'Add reward', selected 'Earn fixed amount of points per order'. Entered 5.00 via individual keypresses. Saved. Close+reopen confirmed second reward row shows 'Get 5.00 fixed points'. Pre-existing default row 'Get 0.00 fixed points' also present.

cases.title: Modify reward amount
cases.notes: With program open from LOY-009 reopen, clicked 5.00 textbox and entered 15.50 via keypresses. Saved (Save became [active]/disabled = clean). Close+reopen confirmed second reward row shows 'Get 15.50 fixed points'. Value persisted correctly.
